short_description: A 2D competitive fighting game featuring a roster of classic and new characters with diverse combat styles and multiple online and offline game modes.
A competitive bounty-hunting game where players track monsters and fight other hunters in a supernatural 19th-century Louisiana setting.
An open-world action role-playing game featuring real-time combat and a post-apocalyptic science fiction setting.
A tactical military shooter set on the island of Everon, focusing on realistic combat and sandbox gameplay mechanics.
Players scavenge abandoned industrial moons for scrap while avoiding dangerous creatures to meet a profit quota for a mysterious company.
A tactical extraction shooter where players infiltrate combat zones to loot gear and survive against other players and AI enemies.
An urban fantasy action role-playing game where players control characters navigating a post-apocalyptic city to battle monsters in interdimensional realms.
A remake of ARK: Survival Evolved featuring updated graphics and mechanics where players tame dinosaurs and build bases on a mysterious island.
A turn-based 4X strategy game where players build an empire from antiquity to the modern era by managing resources, diplomacy, and military conquest.
A third-person team-based multiplayer online battle arena game where players control mythological gods in competitive combat matches.
A massive multiplayer online role-playing game featuring dynamic environments, large-scale guild battles, and a class system based on equipped weapons.
An action role-playing game featuring survival, crafting, and building mechanics set in a vast, decaying open world consumed by a mysterious fog.
A first-person puzzle-adventure game where players explore an abandoned toy factory while avoiding hostile living toys.
A cooperative action-adventure game where two players control a shrinking couple navigating a fantastical world to repair their relationship.
A hack-and-slash action game set in the Three Kingdoms period featuring large-scale battlefield combat.
A professional ice hockey simulation game featuring updated player rosters, improved skating mechanics, and various competitive game modes.
A poker-themed roguelike deck-builder where players use illegal poker hands and unique joker cards to achieve high scores.
A psychological horror game where a player is transported into a mobile game and interacts with a mysterious virtual girl.
A turn-based fantasy role-playing game where players embark on a journey to reclaim the throne through strategic combat and social bonding.

game_title: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle
short_description: A first-person action-adventure game where Indiana Jones explores historical locations to uncover the mystery of the Great Circle between the events of Raiders and The Last Crusade.
A realistic, large-scale World War II tactical shooter featuring 100-player battles with infantry, tanks, and artillery.
A 3D platforming game where Mario explores various worlds to collect Power Stars and rescue Princess Peach from Bowser.
A first-person survival horror game set in the radioactive Chornobyl Exclusion Zone featuring open-world exploration and tactical combat.
A massively multiplayer first-person shooter set in the Chernobyl Exclusion Zone, combining open-world survival mechanics with quest-driven progression.
A cooperative management game where players build, stock, and operate a supermarket together while managing inventory and serving customers.
A 3D massively multiplayer online role-playing game featuring a fantasy world based on Norse mythology and the sequel to the original Ragnarok Online.
A cooperative psychological horror game where players must complete experiments and survive against terrifying enemies in a cold-war era facility.
A narrative-driven choice-based game where players control three androids navigating a futuristic society facing an uprising.
A mixed martial arts simulation game featuring a roster of UFC fighters and realistic combat mechanics.
A cozy community simulation game where players build homes, farm, fish, and interact with villagers in a persistent online world.
A first-person open-world survival game set in the Amazon rainforest where players must manage health, nutrition, and sanity to stay alive.
A high-fidelity flight simulator featuring global terrain, realistic weather systems, and diverse aviation career missions.
An auto-battler game where players draft champions and place them on a grid to fight against seven other opponents in a round-based tournament.
A space exploration game featuring procedurally generated planets, resource gathering, base building, and interstellar travel.
A farming simulation game where players manage crops, livestock, and forestry machinery to build and expand an agricultural enterprise.
An online-only action role-playing game set in a post-pandemic Washington D.C. featuring tactical third-person shooter combat and cooperative mission-based gameplay.
A crossover platform fighting game where players battle to knock opponents off the stage using various Nintendo and third-party characters.
A first-person action game set in a zombie-infested open world where players use parkour and melee combat to survive.
A tactical third-person stealth game where players operate behind enemy lines in occupied France during World War II.
An open-world massively multiplayer online role-playing game set on the supernatural island of Aeternum, featuring combat, crafting, and faction-based territory control.
A life simulation game where players explore an island, complete quests, and build friendships with Sanrio characters.
A narrative-driven game where players manage a news station and influence public opinion through editorial choices in a dystopian society.
A tank combat simulation game featuring historical armored vehicles and tactical battlefield engagements.
A top-down action game where players navigate procedurally generated dungeons, collecting items to gain powers and defeat bosses.
An open-world extraction shooter set in a post-apocalyptic world ravaged by extreme weather events where players scavenge for gear and fight for survival.
An open-world action-adventure game where a former gang member navigates the fictional state of San Andreas while completing missions and interacting with criminal organizations.
An open-world dress-up adventure game where players explore the world of Miraland, collect outfits, and solve platforming puzzles.
A looter-shooter action game where players explore various planets to stop a cult from harnessing the power of alien vaults.
A fantasy massively multiplayer online role-playing game focused on faction-based warfare between the human kingdom of El Morad and the orcish nation of Karus.
A management game where players stock shelves, set prices, process payments, and expand their own retail supermarket business.
